intro: Azadirachta indica cream, also known as neem cream, is a topical cream extracted from the neem tree and has been traditionally used for its medicinal and therapeutic properties. The cream is known to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in soothing skin irritations, wounds, and acne. Additionally, neem cream is also believed to possess antimicrobial properties, which can help in preventing infections and promoting healthy skin.
